articles.title: Jet-Long: Efficient Long-Context Extension with Dynamic Bifocal RoPE

Most existing zero-shot methods f
articles.summary: 针对LLM长上下文零样本扩展效率问题，提出Jet-Long，采用动态双焦旋转位置编码（Dynamic Bifocal RoPE）。该方法在不重训练的情况下高效扩展上下文窗口，支持RAG、代码仓库等长序列任务，保持推理性能。

articles.title: Single-Rollout Asynchronous Optimization for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) is becoming increasingly important for post-training large language models (LLMs). Previous RL pipelines for LLMs were mostly synchronous and batch-interleaved, which is inefficient for long-horizon agentic tasks. Recently, asynchronous RL has emerged as a more efficient alternative by updating the model as rollouts arrive. However, existing asynchronous RL systems ofte
articles.summary: 针对长周期智能体任务中同步RL效率低的问题，提出单次展开异步优化。该方法在rollout到达时立即更新模型，避免批量等待，显著提升LLM后训练效率，尤其适用于智能体强化学习。

articles.title: UP: Unbounded Positive Asymmetric Optimization for Breaking the Exploration-Stability Dilemma
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become the standard paradigm for enhancing the complex reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). To achieve sample efficiency, modern RL frameworks rely on importance sampling (IS). However, these algorithms suffer from an exploration-stability dilemma. articles.summary: 针对LLM强化学习中重要性采样导致的探索-稳定性困境，提出无界正非对称优化（UP）。该方法摒弃标准裁剪机制，在保证训练稳定的同时鼓励探索，提升LLM推理能力的样本效率。

articles.summary: 为解决大规模LLM后训练成本高的问题，提出弱到强泛化方法：在小的学生模型上进行验证奖励RL，再通过直接在线策略蒸馏将能力迁移到目标大模型。该方法大幅降低计算开销，同时保持推理性能。

articles.title: Vision Language Action (VLA) Models for Unmanned Aerial Robotics and Bimanual Manipulation: A Review
articles.excerpt: Vision Language Action (VLA) models unify visual perception, natural-language understanding, and action generation within a single foundation model, allowing a robot to follow instructions such as fold the towel or fly to the red building directly from camera images. articles.summary: 综述视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在无人机与双臂操作中的应用。VLA通过互联网预训练继承世界知识，直接将指令转化为动作，成为机器人学习的主流框架。文章梳理了现有方法、数据集与挑战。

articles.title: RynnWorld-4D: 4D Embodied World Models for Robotic Manipulation
articles.excerpt: Robotic manipulation in the open world requires not only recognizing what a scene looks like, but also anticipating how its 3D structure moves under interaction. articles.summary: 针对开放世界机器人操作中3D结构动态预测需求，提出RynnWorld-4D，利用同步RGB、深度和光流（RGB-DF）作为物理化表示，捕捉场景4D动态。该世界模型提升对交互后物体运动的预测能力，助力操作决策。

articles.title: RynnWorld-Teleop: An Action-Conditioned World Model for Digital Teleoperation
articles.excerpt: Scaling robot learning requires massive, diverse trajectory data, yet collection is currently bottlenecked by physical teleoperation, where every demonstration binds operator time to specific hardware and workspaces. articles.summary: 为解决物理遥操作瓶颈，提出RynnWorld-Teleop，用动作条件世界模型实现数字遥操作。操作员在生成的环境中示范，与硬件和空间解耦，大幅扩展机器人学习所需轨迹数据的规模和多样性。
